mapper.select: SELECT sku.id AS sku_id, sku.sku_code, sku.spu_id, p.name AS product_name, co.name AS color, so.code AS size, inv.available_stock, inv.locked_stock, inv.sold_stock, CASE WHEN inv.available_stock > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS in_stock FROM inventory inv JOIN product_sku sku ON sku.id = inv.sku_id JOIN product_spu p ON p.id = sku.spu_id JOIN color co ON co.id = sku.color_id JOIN size_option so ON so.id = sku.size_id WHERE sku.id = #{skuId}
